lastCommit.message: Site now uses the full browser width instead of a 960px column: per-page width system (--wrapmax) sized to what each page's content can spend -- calendar/timeline/map/graph go near-full, questions flow two newspaper columns at desktop widths, entity pages gain a sticky Related/Linked-from side rail at 1400px+ with body text held to a readable 82ch measure; full timeline years spread edge to edge while sparse years center capped cards; mobile layouts untouched and verified overflow-free
